name: rename_cell
full_help:
rename_cell

Description: 
rename a cell

Syntax: 
rename_cell  -to <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose] <cell>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -to         New name
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <cell>      Cell to rename

Categories: 
Netlist

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
